sessionList.title: Sessions
sessionList.noProxyBadgeTooltip: {{missing}} LLM call(s) without proxy data ({{matched}}/{{total}} matched)

digest.title: LLM Daily Report
digest.llmGenerating: LLM is generating the report, usually takes 30–60 seconds…
digest.noReport: No report yet, click to regenerate

freshInput.tooltip: Input tokens NOT served from cache and NOT written to cache — the API's usage.input_tokens field, billed at the 1× baseline rate. Matches the 'input' column in `claude /cost`.

cacheRead.tooltip: Input tokens served from the prompt cache. Higher cache read = lower cost and lower latency.

cacheWrite.tooltip: Tokens written to the prompt cache for future reuse. A separate billing item — not input, not output.

output.tooltip: Tokens generated by the model. The primary driver of latency tail and output cost.

contextUsed.tooltip: Tokens placed in the model's context window. Not the same as billed input tokens.

contextDelta.tooltip: Change in context size vs. the previous call. Spot which step inflated the window.

peakContext.tooltip: Largest context window size observed in this session or turn.

cacheRatio.label: Cache Ratio
cacheRatio.tooltip: cache_read / (input + cache_read + cache_write). Higher = better cache efficiency.

proxyTraffic.title: Proxy Traffic
proxyTraffic.hostInvalid: Please enter a valid hostname (host[:port] only, no https://)
proxyTraffic.visibilityJumpTip: Jump to the matching call in that session

visibilityTip.visible: request-id matched a LLM call surfaced by the session parser — visible in the session UI
visibilityTip.hidden: Belongs to the session, but parser didn't surface it (typical: sub-agent, internal synthetic calls, merged frames)
visibilityTip.sessionGone: The corresponding jsonl file has been deleted
visibilityTip.unattributed: No session-id header, or request-id is a proxy-injected synthetic ID (never appears in jsonl)
visibilityTip.computing: Parser is running in the background for this session; refresh shortly

proxyTraffic.bodyFileDeleted: Original log file has been deleted
proxyTraffic.bodyParseErrorHint: (failed to parse the proxy log line — possibly truncated, offset stale after rotation, or partial gzip read)
proxyTraffic.sseWarningTip: SSE response has no parsed events; possibly closed early or non-standard format

proxy.intro: Proxy v2 — minimal controller. Start = inject settings + spawn; Stop = restore settings + kill. Dashboard exits auto-stop.
proxy.title: Proxy v2
proxy.subtitle: controller-managed

charts.xAxisTimeHint: X axis = cumulative active time (user idle excluded)

badges.noProxyDetail: {{count}} call(s) without proxy — attribution falls back to JSONL estimates; raw request body unavailable

subAgent.proxyNoticeBody: Turns / Calls / Tools / Context are reconstructed from the sub-agent's own JSONL. Proxy attribution (Raw / Proxy / per-call Attribution tabs) isn't wired up for sub-agents yet — those panels will appear empty. Cross-linking sub-agent requestIds to the proxy DB is on the roadmap.
subAgent.jumpToConsumerTooltip: This sub-agent's tool_result was first injected into Call #{{callId}}'s request — open the right-side panel to see the exact location in that request.
subAgent.viewSubAgentDetailTooltip: Open this {{agentType}} sub-agent's full inner conversation (turns / calls / tools)

sessionDetail.noTurns: No conversation data for this day

attribution.unavailable: Attribution unavailable — proxy data may be missing for this call.

rawTab.noProxyBody: This call has no matching proxy request body. Attribution / Diff views rely on the local proxy capturing requests as they happen.
rawTab.noProxyGuide: Install and enable the proxy from the «{{tab}}» tab. Calls made afterwards will carry full request bodies.
rawTab.noProxyCaveat: Existing calls can't be backfilled — the proxy only records traffic while it's running.
rawTab.noProxyBodyStopped: Once you start the local proxy, future calls will be recorded with full request / response bodies.
rawTab.noProxyRestartHint: After the proxy starts, you must restart Claude Code so new calls go through the proxy. Existing calls can't be backfilled.
rawTab.noProxyTitleRunning: No proxy data for this call
rawTab.noProxyBodyRunning: The proxy is running, but this call has no matching request body. Common causes: (a) the call happened before the proxy started, or (b) Claude Code was not restarted after enabling the proxy, so the request still went through the original path.
rawTab.noProxyManageHint: For more settings and traffic browsing, go to the «{{tab}}» tab.
rawTab.noProxyRunningHintRestart: Agents already running before the proxy started won't be captured. Restart the Agent (Claude Code) so its traffic goes through the proxy.
rawTab.noProxyRunningHintThirdParty: By default only api.anthropic.com is intercepted. If you use a third-party API (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL points to your own gateway), add that hostname under «{{tab}}» → «{{section}}».
rawTab.noProxyDotTooltip: This call has no matching proxy request body

reason.noProxy: This call has no matching proxy request body
reason.drilldownMiss: Call not found in session drilldown

lensBanner.diffUnavailableCacheStillOk: Cache view still works (built from this request's structure)
lensBanner.prevNotCaptured: Previous call (#{{prevCallId}}) has no proxy data — nothing to diff against.
lensBanner.curNotCaptured: This call has no proxy data — cannot build a baseline.
lensBanner.prevParseFailed: Previous call's request body failed to parse.
lensBanner.noPrev: This is the first request in the session — no previous to compare against.

howToRead.title: How to read this
howToRead.step1: Intent groups: the top bar slices the prompt by what each part is doing (system / tools / conversation …); width = share of context.
howToRead.step2: Drill in: click any group bar or table row to expand its segment list.
howToRead.step3: Trace a source: click a segment to see its origin, JSONL / request path, char share, and jump to the call that produced it.
howToRead.step4: Overlay lenses: the top Lens row adds Diff (added/removed vs. the previous call) / Cache (L1/L2/L3 hits).
howToRead.sectionOpenHint: Group expanded — click any segment above to see its attribution detail.

diff.noChanges: ✓ No changes vs previous call · all sections identical
diff.charsTooltip: Net character delta (cur − prev). Counts text characters only — not LLM tokens. Tokenizer behavior varies by content (CJK / code / JSON), so refer to the Context metric in the header for actual token usage.

cacheImpact.label: Cache impact
cacheImpact.explainFormula: drift = current cache_read − [prev cache_create + prev cache_read]
cacheImpact.explainSource: All three numbers come directly from Anthropic response.usage (exact, billed values). No estimation, no prediction, no tokenizer.
cacheImpact.explainHealthy: drift ≈ 0 → every token cached last call (cw + cr) is now served as cache_read this call. Prefix is conserved, normal.
cacheImpact.explainBroken: drift strongly negative (≥ 1000 tok) → cache breach: at least one cache_control entry was invalidated. Possible causes: tools list changed (added/removed), system prompt changed, 1h TTL expired (long gap between calls), context compaction rewrote history.
cacheImpact.explainAttribution: We can only point at the largest changed section in the diff — that's an observation, not a causal proof. A single call may have multiple triggers stacked (edit + remove + TTL); we can't isolate the actual culprit from wire diff alone.
cacheImpact.explainNote: Only diagnoses actual hit/miss vs. previous call. Does not predict future behavior. To pin down which section broke the cache, cross-reference the SectionDiffBar colors below.

pin.explanation: Anthropic writes one cache entry covering the entire prefix from request start to this position. On subsequent matching requests, the full prefix is billed as cache_read.

unavailable.noPrev: This is the first call of the session — nothing to diff against.
unavailable.prevNotCaptured: Previous request was not captured — diff unavailable.
unavailable.curNotCaptured: This request was not captured — diff unavailable.
unavailable.prevParseFailed: Failed to parse previous request — diff unavailable.

cache.noPins: No cache_control markers in this request — no cache entries will be written.
cache.headerNote: Prefix caching: each layer contains the previous + delta. Click the Raw row to expand attribution.
cache.leafListHint: Click any row → highlights its position across cache layers

terms.ledgerInterpretation: New input this round: {{freshIn}} ({{cacheWrite}} written to cache for reuse) · loaded from cache: {{cacheRead}} · model output: {{output}}{{ratio}}
terms.openCallResponseTooltip: Open Call #{{callId}} Response view and jump to this tool_use block
terms.jumpToCallCardTooltip: Jump to call #{{callId}} card in Turn view (this tool_use came from that call's response)
terms.jumpToCallLineTooltip: Jump to this JSONL event's line in Turn view (first injected into prompt by call #{{callId}})
terms.openAttributionAtLine: Open attribution for call #{{callId}} and jump to the matching leaf

eventKindDesc.ai_title: AI-generated session title (background Haiku call). Shown in the session list / --resume only; does NOT enter the conversation context. Overridden by a user /rename custom title.
eventKindDesc.last_prompt: Snapshot of the session's most recent user prompt (newlines flattened, truncated to 200 chars). For --resume / claude ps listing; does NOT enter context — the real prompt lives in the user message.
eventKindDesc.permission_mode: Current tool permission mode (default / acceptEdits / bypassPermissions / plan). Client-side session state for --resume and telemetry; the specific mode value does NOT enter context (the model only sees a generic permission-mode line in the system prompt).
eventKindDesc.file_history_snapshot: File-checkpoint snapshot: backup pointers for files changed at a given message, used to rewind/restore. Backups live on disk and do NOT enter context; an empty snapshot is the session's initial baseline.
eventKindDesc.custom_title: Session title set by the user via /rename (takes read priority over the AI title). Display-only; does NOT enter context.
eventKindDesc.agent_name: Display name of a (sub-)agent session. Client-side session state; does NOT enter context.
eventKindDesc.queue_operation: Record of the user queuing/dequeuing a message while the LLM was running (enqueue, etc.). Filtered out when reconstructing the session log; does NOT enter context.
eventKindDesc.worktree_state: Session's git worktree state (worktreeSession = null means it exited the worktree). Used by --resume to tell whether the session is still inside a worktree; does NOT enter context.

ledgerExplainer.title: Token Ledger · How it's computed
ledgerExplainer.emptyInput: No input this round — all three input buckets are 0; Cache Ratio is undefined.
ledgerExplainer.footer: The four buckets above never overlap and map to Anthropic's real billing tiers: cache_read ≈ 0.1× discount · cache_write ≈ 1.25× premium · input ≈ 1.0× baseline · output billed independently.
ledgerExplainer.footerAggSuffix:
In aggregate view, each bucket sums across the session/turn scope.

Scope: JSONL-only — the main session's visible conversation calls. NOT counted: sub-agent calls (see their own drilldown) · background calls Claude Code makes itself (haiku title generation, retries, quota probes — these never write to JSONL). This is why aggregates here run lower than claude /cost, which counts every API call.

rows.cacheReadCall: API cache_read_input_tokens — input loaded from prompt cache this call. Billed at ~0.1× (cheapest tier). Matches the 'cache read' column in claude /cost.
rows.cacheReadAgg: Sum of cache_read_input_tokens across calls — cumulative input loaded from cache.
rows.cacheWriteCall: API cache_creation_input_tokens — input written to prompt cache this call (new content tagged for future reuse). Billed at ~1.25× (premium for the cache-write op). Matches the 'cache write' column in claude /cost.
rows.cacheWriteAgg: Sum of cache_creation_input_tokens across calls — cumulative input newly written to cache.
rows.freshInCall: API usage.input_tokens — non-cached input this call (not read from cache, not written to cache). Billed at 1× baseline. Matches the 'input' column in claude /cost.
rows.freshInAgg: Sum of usage.input_tokens across calls — non-cached input portion (not read from cache, not written to cache). Aligns with claude /cost's 'input' total per model.
rows.outputCall: Tokens the LLM generated in this call

skillListing.title: Skills Registry
skillListing.tooltipDataSourceValue: Injected by cli.js uMY() each turn; first turn dumps all skills, later turns push deltas only
